title: Evolution approval panel
acceptance_criteria: EvolutionPanel.tsx fetches pending evolution approvals via TanStack Query (getPendingEvolutions()); 60s refetch interval
Each pending approval card shows: personality name, parameter name, current value, proposed value, rationale text, regime context, requested_at (IST)
Approve button calls approveEvolution(id) via Axios POST; on success invalidates the pending-evolutions and personalities queries (cache refresh); shows loading state during request
Reject button opens a minimal reason input (optional text) then calls rejectEvolution(id, reason); same cache invalidation
If approve returns 409 (already processed), show a friendly 'Already applied' message — not an error toast
If approve returns 400 (frozen personality or disallowed parameter), show 'Cannot apply: [server error message]'
Shows 'No pending approvals' placeholder when queue is empty
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
